uplink._note: Synthetic SL311 TLV frame: device-info 00 3F 24 (version 1, battery level 31), CO2 block 30 05 04 00010BF8 (gas-type 04 = CO2, 0x00010BF8 = 68600 /100 = 686.00 ppm), temperature 04 00C9 (0x00C9=201 /10 = 20.1 C), humidity 05 37 (0x37 = 55 %RH). CO2 cross-checked against the manual's own decoder (686). 0x30/0x04 -> air.co2; 0x04 -> air.temperature; 0x05 -> air.relativeHumidity. Satisfies air-quality.
A frame with only temperature and no CO2 gas block cannot satisfy the air-quality contract.
